/usr/bin/c++ -Os -g -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/scratch_nested-subdir_scratch-nested-subdir-executable.dir/scratch-nested-subdir-executable.cc.o" -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/scratch/nested-subdir/ns3.45-scratch-nested-subdir-executable-default   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libscratch-nested-subdir-lib.a /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed
